history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man is sitting in a chair, wearing a navy blue football jersey with the number 33 in white on the front. He has on a bright blue baseball cap, which he is adjusting with his hands. A thick silver chain with a pendant hangs around his neck. He's also wearing black pants and vibrant blue high-top sneakers with white accents.

The setting appears to be an outdoor or semi-outdoor cafe with a rustic, industrial vibe. To the left of the man, a wooden table and chairs are visible. Behind him, a textured gray wall is adorned with large, lush green plants in dark pots. The floor is a distressed concrete with visible cracks. Sunlight casts strong shadows on the floor and the wooden table in the foreground, indicating bright, natural lighting. The overall color palette is dominated by blues, grays, and the warm tones of the wood. The mood is casual and stylish, with a touch of urban streetwear influence.
